{"roles":[{"name":"旁白","description":"叙述者，负责环境描述和叙述","suggested_voice":"故事-逗叔君.wav"},{"name":"战彦寒","description":"男主人，冷厉强势，情绪压迫感强","suggested_voice":"云浩宇（影视模式.wav"}],"segments":[{"text":"我本是一只","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"无忧无虑的宠物猫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"却因嘴馋偷喝了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"一口主人的可乐","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"没想竟从猫咪","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"变成了人类","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"还好巧不巧的被","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"主人战彦寒","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"撞个正着","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"此时我裹着猫毯","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"躺在床上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒还以为我是","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"哪个对家派来的诱饵","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"二话不说掐住","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"text":"我的脖子","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"text":"眼神冷得像冰","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"你是怎么进来的","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.8,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我肚子上全是淤青","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"身上也被划得","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"鲜血淋漓","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"手心还在冒血","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"可战彦寒根本","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"不吃这一套","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"认定我这是为了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"爬床演的苦肉计","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"他满眼嫌弃","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"哑巴了","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"那声音冷得我","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"直哆嗦","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我惊恐地一抬头","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"战彦寒整个人","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"都僵住了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"不是被我的美貌惊艳","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"而是因为我那双","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"祖母绿的眼睛","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"跟他走丢的那只猫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"一模一样","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"但他眼底的寒意","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"反而更重了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"谁派你来的","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.8,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"由于缺氧我的脸","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"涨得通红","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"直到眼角滑下一滴","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"生理性的泪水","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"他才像丢垃圾一样","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"把我甩在地上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我疼得浑身发抖","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"费劲地爬起来","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"我不懂人类的羞耻","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"就这么光着身子","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"拉开门往外走","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒听到","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"楼道里的脚步声","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"烦躁地深吸一口气","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"冲过来一把","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"text":"将我拽回去","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"text":"随手从衣柜扯了件","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"衬衫丢我头上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我被砸懵了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"委屈得眼泪","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"啪嗒直掉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"喵呜","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"我本能地想求饶","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"却发出了猫叫声","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒听我学猫叫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"火气更大了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"穿上衣服","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.8,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"立马给我滚","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.8,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我抽噎着笨拙地","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"把衬衫套反了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"临走前","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.8},{"text":"我依依不舍地","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"看了他一眼","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"却只见他满脸阴沉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"外头雷雨交加","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"战彦寒躺在床上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"翻来覆去睡不着","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"脑子里全是我","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"临走前那个","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"绝望的眼神","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"天一亮门外","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[
